title: Web Dynamic Image Grid — count-aware gallery layout, fixed-ratio cells & per-cell responsive images

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for gallery overlay strings (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add the new user-facing strings to @repo/i18n: '+N más' overlay label (with count interpolation) and 'ver todas las fotos' CTA, in es/en/pt locale files under the existing gallery namespace (alongside viewAll/viewFullscreen/photosSubpage). Regenerate i18n types. Tests: locale-completeness check passes for the 3 locales; key lookup returns interpolated count.

subtasks.title: Add keys to es/en/pt locale JSON

tasks.title: Count-aware composition in DetailVariant + '+N más' overlay
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/ImageGallery.client.tsx DetailVariant (~line 200): replace thumbs.slice(0,3) + binary mosaicWithThumbs with count-aware composition for 1/2/3/4/5+ images per spec §5 layout matrix. At 5+, render the '+N más' overlay as a keyboard-accessible button on the last visible cell that opens the lightbox at that index. Use the T-001 i18n keys. Tests are written in T-005 (same PR).

tasks.title: Per-count CSS rules in ImageGallery.module.css (detail variant)
tasks.description: Add .grid/.cellFeatured/.cellHalf/.cellQuarter/.moreOverlay classes (spec §6) and per-count layout rules to apps/web/src/components/ImageGallery.module.css; remove the unconditional grid-template-rows: repeat(3,1fr) on .thumbGrid (~line 84). Add the tablet breakpoint rules per spec FR-7 (641-1023px) alongside the existing 640px query. Visual result: no empty reserved rows at any count.

tasks.title: Remove outer gallery pre-slice in alojamientos/[slug].astro
tasks.description: Spec §8 step 1b (realign D-1): apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro (~lines 293-310) builds galleryImages as [featured, ...gallery.slice(0,3)] before passing to the island, capping accommodations at 4 images and making the 5+ overlay unreachable. Pass the FULL gallery; the island now owns all capping. Events/posts already pass full galleries — no change there.

tasks.title: Vitest coverage for detail variant count logic + overlay
tasks.description: New test file for ImageGallery detail variant (testing-library): assert rendered cell count at 1/2/3/4/5+ images; overlay present with correct '+N' label ONLY at 5+; overlay keyboard activation (Enter/Space) opens lightbox at the right index; no overlay at <=4; alt text preserved per cell.

tasks.title: Count-aware CoverPlusGridVariant
tasks.description: In ImageGallery.client.tsx CoverPlusGridVariant (~line 277): replace rest.slice(0,6) + fixed .inlineGrid repeat(3,1fr) (~module.css line 161) with count-aware column tracks per spec §5, reusing T-003 cell classes; '+N más' overlay at cap, same behavior as detail variant.

tasks.title: Vitest coverage for cover-plus-grid variant
tasks.description: Mirror T-005 tests for CoverPlusGridVariant: per-count column composition, overlay only above cap, keyboard activation, post detail page coverage.

tasks.title: Fixed aspect-ratio + object-fit on every gallery cell
tasks.description: Spec FR-3: give every cell a fixed aspect-ratio + object-fit:cover + object-position:center. detail variant featured (.featuredImg currently relies on max-height:480px, no ratio) and thumbs (no ratio at all) get true ratios; cover-plus-grid already has 16/9 cover + 4/3 inlineGridBtn — align with §5 locked ratios.

tasks.title: Request Cloudinary c_fill crop per cell ratio
tasks.description: Request server-side crop matching each cell's ratio: c_fill + ar_ tokens (interim via raw override on the existing gallery preset until T-011 adds dedicated presets). ar_ is already allowlisted in @repo/media get-media-url.ts ALLOWED_RAW_TOKEN_PREFIXES (line 22). Touch ImageGallery.client.tsx and/or lib/media.ts extractGalleryItems.

tasks.title: CLS test + object-position sanity
tasks.description: Spec §8 step 7: assert the gallery contributes zero layout shift (fixed-ratio cells render with reserved space before image load); object-position default center sanity check.

tasks.title: Add 4 gallery* presets to @repo/media
tasks.description: Add galleryFeatured/galleryHalf/galleryQuarter/galleryThumb presets to packages/media/src/presets.ts per spec §7 (c_fill + ar_ + width + q_auto,f_auto,dpr_auto). Update preset-count test 7 → 11 and the explicit key list (packages/media/src/__tests__/presets.test.ts:16), plus the safe-token test.

tasks.title: Wire per-cell srcset/sizes in the island
tasks.description: Spec FR-4: per cell role, build srcset candidates via @repo/media width override (get-media-url.ts:248-257 regex-replaces w_ in preset — verified working) + sizes attr matching §5 breakpoints. Update extractGalleryItems/lib/media.ts only if cells need the base public-id to build candidates. Featured keeps eager/high-priority loading.

tasks.title: Tests for presets + srcset wiring + LCP guard
tasks.description: Spec §8 step 10: preset transforms contain c_fill+ar_; every cell's srcset has >=2 candidates; featured image keeps loading=eager + fetchPriority=high and does not pick a heavier LCP candidate than today (w_800 baseline).

tasks.title: Replace /fotos masonry with fixed-ratio grid
tasks.description: apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug]/fotos.astro: replace columns:3 masonry (~line 188) with .fotosGrid/.fotosCell fixed-ratio system (all photos + videos, c_fill). Realign D-10: replace BOTH media queries — current masonry uses 1024px→2/768px→1; locked §5 breakpoints are >=1024=3 / 640-1023=2 / <640=1. The 768px query must not survive. GLightbox links (data-glightbox/data-gallery) stay as-is.

tasks.title: Verify /fotos videos + GLightbox + reflow at 3 breakpoints
tasks.description: Spec §8 step 12: video thumbnail + play overlay + GLightbox still work on /fotos after T-014; reflow test at the three §5 breakpoints (>=1024, 640-1023, <640).

tasks.title: Delete dead HeroGallery.astro + JSDoc cleanup
tasks.description: Delete apps/web/src/components/accommodation/HeroGallery.astro (verified dead: zero runtime imports, 4 JSDoc refs only). Remove dangling references: lib/media.ts:105 and :275, lib/api/transforms.ts:636, data/types.ts:576. Grep proves zero HeroGallery references remain; build + typecheck green.

tasks.title: Full quality gate: web + media + i18n green
tasks.description: Run typecheck + lint + tests for apps/web, packages/media, packages/i18n. Everything green before the manual smoke. No .only/.skip committed.

tasks.title: Manual visual smoke (4 entities + /fotos, 3 breakpoints, 3 locales)
tasks.description: Spec §8 Phase 7: browser validation of the gallery at 1/2/3/4/5+ images on accommodation/event/destination (detail) + post (cover-plus-grid) + /fotos at the three breakpoints; the new strings in es/en/pt. Then flip spec + task indexes to completed.
